category_sources: Official Policy Sentry repository describes it as an IAM Least Privilege Policy Generator.
source_facts.description says generate locked-down AWS IAM policies.
display_name_sources: Official ReadTheDocs title and GitHub README use Policy Sentry.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links policy-sentry.readthedocs.io as the project documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official ReadTheDocs documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official ReadTheDocs/GitHub project links and the official GitHub repository salesforce/policy_sentry.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes least-privilege IAM policy generation and AWS IAM documentation usage.
Official GitHub topics include aws, security, cloud, iam, aws-security, and iam-policy.
source_facts.description identifies AWS IAM policy generation.
